mapper.sql: t.id, t.party_id, t.order_id, t.party_role, t.user_id, t.name, t.mobile_encrypted, t.mobile_hash, t.id_no_encrypted, t.id_no_hash, t.relation_to_buyer, t.address_encrypted, t.authorized_flag, t.authorized_proof_type, t.authorized_proof_url, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order_party t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order_party t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order_party t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order_party ( party_id, order_id, party_role, user_id, name, mobile_encrypted, mobile_hash, id_no_encrypted, id_no_hash, relation_to_buyer, address_encrypted, authorized_flag, authorized_proof_type, authorized_proof_url, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{partyId}, #{orderId}, #{partyRole}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{mobileEncrypted}, #{mobileHash}, #{idNoEncrypted}, #{idNoHash}, #{relationToBuyer}, #{addressEncrypted}, #{authorizedFlag}, #{authorizedProofType}, #{authorizedProofUrl}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_order_party ( party_id, order_id, party_role, user_id, name, mobile_encrypted, mobile_hash, id_no_encrypted, id_no_hash, relation_to_buyer, address_encrypted, authorized_flag, authorized_proof_type, authorized_proof_url, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.partyId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.partyRole}, #{item.userId}, #{item.name}, #{item.mobileEncrypted}, #{item.mobileHash}, #{item.idNoEncrypted}, #{item.idNoHash}, #{item.relationToBuyer}, #{item.addressEncrypted}, #{item.authorizedFlag}, #{item.authorizedProofType}, #{item.authorizedProofUrl}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order_party t SET
t.name = #{name},
t.mobile_encrypted = #{mobileEncrypted},
t.id_no_encrypted = #{idNoEncrypted},
t.authorized_flag = #{authorizedFlag},
t.authorized_proof_type = #{authorizedProofType},
t.authorized_proof_url = #{authorizedProofUrl},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order_party t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
